name: barracuda_secure_edge
explanation: Barracuda SecureEdge is a marketplace tile that ships only a logs configuration: the spec defines a fixed set of file tail sources under /var/phion/logs/ (auth, firewall, vpn, ssh, etc.) and the datadog_checks/barracuda_secure_edge package contains no check.py - just __about__.py, __init__.py and the conf.yaml.example. There is no Agent metric check, no network probe, and no endpoint to discover. Enabling the integration is a matter of whether the SecureEdge log files happen to be present on the Agent host (which they only are if the Agent is co-located on the appliance or its logs are rsynced/mounted there).
notes: Pattern N (logs-only marketplace tile). No check.py - integration is a logs config + manifest only.
